coreCompetencies: Understanding of Markov decision processes: states, actions, rewards and transitions

Use of Git to version experiment configurations
indicators: Requires constant supervision
Completes guided training tasks in simple environments
Needs 3-6 months to become productive

coreCompetencies: Implementation of Q-learning and SARSA with action-value tables

Design of reward functions for simple control tasks

Writing tests for update and policy functions
complementaryCompetencies: Knowledge of experience replay and target networks
Implementation of basic policy gradients such as REINFORCE

indicators: Builds complete RL agents with occasional supervision

Actively participates in code and experiment reviews
